description: x402 passthrough for DefiLlama key-free yield data: APY across thousands of DeFi pools, plus per-pool historical APY/TVL. Yield-discovery and allocation data layer for agents. Data by DefiLlama.

endpoints.description: All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/pools`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /pools
zh-CN.title: All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /pools
endpoints.title: All yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs all yield pools with current APY, TVL, chain, project and risk flags through the defillama-yields-tron gateway route.

endpoints.description: Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id

zh-CN.description: 通过 gateway 调用 `/chart/{pool}`，用于获取该接口对应的公开数据。
zh-CN.subtitle: /chart/{pool}
zh-CN.title: Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 在分析、交易、风控或数据查询流程中按需调用。

endpoints.subtitle: /chart/{pool}
endpoints.title: Historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent needs historical APY / TVL time series for a single pool id through the defillama-yields-tron gateway route.

zh-CN.description: DefiLlama 数据 API（TRON） 通过 x402 gateway 提供公开数据访问，适合 Agent 在金融分析、交易研究、风险筛查和数据聚合流程中调用。
zh-CN.subtitle: Use to discover and compare DeFi yields: list all pools with current APY/TVL, or pull one pool's historical APY/TVL series for allocation decisions.
zh-CN.title: DefiLlama 数据 API（TRON）
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要链上金融、价格、收益、DEX 或安全数据的 Agent 工作流。

sub_title: Use to discover and compare DeFi yields: list all pools with current APY/TVL, or pull one pool's historical APY/TVL series for allocation decisions.
subtitle: Use to discover and compare DeFi yields: list all pools with current APY/TVL, or pull one pool's historical APY/TVL series for allocation decisions.
title: DefiLlama Yields / APY API (TRON x402)
use_case: Use to discover and compare DeFi yields: list all pools with current APY/TVL, or pull one pool's historical APY/TVL series for allocation decisions.
